samples.xml_description:
<module id="freq_div">
    <description>Design a frequency divider that divides the input clock frequency of 100MHz signal, and the outputs are 3 clock frequencies: 50MHz, 10MHz, 1MHz.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="CLK_in">Input clock signal</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal</input>
        <output id="CLK_50">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2.</output>
        <output id="CLK_10">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10.</output>
        <output id="CLK_1">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="N">3</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[N-1:0]">count_n</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[N-1:0]">count_10</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[N-1:0]">count_100</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <comment>Initialize counters</comment>
        <always_comb>
            <if>
                <condition>
                    <and>
                        <item>Reset signal is active</item>
                    </and>
                </condition>
                <then>
                    <assign>
                        <item>count_n = 0</item>
                    </assign>
                </then>
            </if>
            <else>
                <assign>
                    <item>count_n = count_n + 1</item>
                </assign>
            </else>
        </always_comb>
    </implementation>
</module>
